data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior regarding consolidated versus per-location reports. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific data or API responses that confirm the expected results or the ability to simulate the scenario deterministically. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga lifecycle but do not address the necessary validation for the reporting metrics outlined in the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of scenario behavior confirming consolidated vs per-location reports.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the scenario behavior.
